text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It was my day off! I thought I'd use the time to
build somethin' easy like a desk or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There I was with a ruler in hand, puzzlin' my way
through the designin' process.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...And before I realized it, it was already mornin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How the heck am I supposed to assemble that thing? My beloved saw's gonna go rusty if I keep stallin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a half-asleep expression on her face, Inari
One scratches her head in puzzlement.
